":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1710881850,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7242231960955784204","book_info":{"abstract":"《双洁+空间+甜宠+男强女强+爽文》
她是21世纪的古武世家的顶级药师，一朝穿越到将军府废物大小姐身上，本是嫡出小姐，身份尊贵，却沦落到人人可欺地步。
废物？草包？解除封印后，她觉醒了五灵根，觉醒了先天灵体，想欺我之人，买好棺材等着。
不过这传闻中不近女色的妖孽国师第一次见面就死皮赖脸的缠着她怎么回事？
她：“喂～宫冥越，你幼不幼稚？就不怕毁了你男神的形象？”
某国师大人：“原来本尊是九丫头的男神啊？”
她：“臭不要脸。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/108c9edc5e1278579a2f822a9173da75","author":"妤笑笑","author_id":"","book_id":"7242231960955784204","book_name":"你惹她干嘛，她满空间神兽","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":248,"name":"玄幻言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=248&name=玄幻言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":85,"name":"王妃","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=85&name=王妃&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":88,"name":"嫡女","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=88&name=嫡女&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7242494272748913167","read_count":"28594","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1476477"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"701","tags":"玄幻言情,古代言情,穿越,空间,王妃,女强,嫡女,甜宠,
